description: Simple two-person interview with clear speaker attribution
source_text:
Interviewer: Welcome to the show. Tell us about your latest project.
Guest: Thanks for having me. We've been building an open-source tool that helps writers format their manuscripts automatically.
Interviewer: That sounds fascinating. How long have you been working on it?
Guest: About two years now. It started as a weekend experiment and kind of grew from there.
Interviewer: What's been the biggest challenge so far?
Guest: Honestly, handling all the edge cases in different manuscript styles. Every writer has their own conventions.
Interviewer: Do you have any advice for other developers tackling similar problems?
Guest: Start small. Ship early. Don't wait until it's perfect before letting people try it.
Interviewer: Wise words. What's next on the roadmap?
Guest: We're adding multi-language support and better integration with popular word processors.
Interviewer: Excellent. Thanks so much for joining us today.
Guest: My pleasure. It's been a great conversation.
